It does not include the pass thru per diem amounts (i.e., capital-related direct medical education costs, 
kidney acquisition deductibles and coinsurance), or any other payer reimbursement. 

Under SNF PPS, services are paid using the patient classification system known as RUGs III. 

For the SNF PPS claim, the rate for each revenue center line item with revenue center code = '0022' is
